enhances.context: The extracted DESIGN.md is the implementation contract sk-code builds against - verbatim colours, type, spacing, shadows, radii

siblings.context: Design-family pair: this skill captures an existing site's real design system; sk-design-interface invents new distinctive direction
Sibling design-extraction tool sourcing from Figma Desktop instead of a live URL, with a DESIGN.md output overlap
Sibling design tool sourcing from Open Design projects; this skill is the live-URL extraction path

key_topics: live-website CSS extraction into a v3 Style Reference DESIGN.md
6-digit lowercase hex and L1-L4 stability classification
tokens.json output at output/<domain>/ and validate.ts fidelity check
self-contained TypeScript pipeline embedded under backend/
derived.causal_summary: sk-design-md-generator captures a live website's real, measured CSS into a publication-quality v3 Style Reference DESIGN.md so AI agents build against ground truth instead of hallucinating colours, fonts, spacing, and shadows. It ships an embedded TypeScript pipeline under backend/ that runs a three-phase pipeline: EXTRACT (a Playwright crawler samples five viewports and emits output/<domain>/tokens.json with every token tagged a 4-layer stability class), WRITE (the agent composes the v3 Style Reference DESIGN.md copying every numeric value verbatim from tokens.json, 6-digit lowercase hex, L1+L2 in main sections, L3 marked subject-to-change, L4 excluded; the value-bearing sections are pre-rendered deterministically, so the agent writes prose only), and VALIDATE (validate.ts checks hex accuracy and section completeness). The cardinal rule is verbatim fidelity: a value that is estimated, rounded, or invented breaks the document's whole reason to exist. It is the extraction-and-format-fidelity engine of the sk-design-* family - sibling to sk-design-interface (which invents new distinctive direction) and the mcp-figma / mcp-open-design transports (which source from Figma and Open Design rather than live URLs) - and its DESIGN.md is the implementation contract sk-code builds against. Setup is a one-time cd backend && npm install && npx playwright install chromium.
